title: WidgetConfig
description: Workspace-level storefront widget configuration. Single source of truth: Rails (Workspace#widget_config) MUST produce this shape, and the TypeScript widget (WidgetConfig interface) MUST consume this shape. Contract spec on both sides validates against this file — drift on either side fails CI.

star_icon_url.description: Optional custom brand-icon URL. null when the workspace hasn't uploaded one.

star_icon_empty_url.description: Optional distinct empty-state artwork. null falls back to filled icon at low opacity.

custom_css.description: Workspace-supplied CSS injected into the widget's shadow DOM.
